Bash(cd C:/Users/Acer/Projecten/waaranders-vrijwilligers && python -c "
from docx import Document
for name in ['HERSTART', 'OVERDRACHT']:
    doc = Document\(f'{name}.docx'\)
    paras = [p.text for p in doc.paragraphs if p.text.strip\(\)]
    tables = len\(doc.tables\)
    print\(f'{name}.docx: {len\(paras\)} paragrafen, {tables} tabellen, eerste kop: \\"{paras[0] if paras else \\"-\\"}\\"'\)
")
